basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Jr. Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 29-06-2026.

age_limit.details: No age limit is specified in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st class M. Tech in CS/Biomedical Design with NET/GATE qualification or equivalent, 1st Class Dual degree in CS/Biomedical Design/Engineering Design with NET/GATE qualification or equivalent
qualification.details: 1st class M. Tech in CS/Biomedical Design with NET/GATE qualification or equivalent in the appropriate discipline. Or 1st Class Dual degree in CS/ Biomedical Design/ Engineering Design with NET/ GATE qualification or equivalent in the appropriate discipline. Desirable: Experience in working with Vision Language Models, Generative AI models for radiology report generation, and Tabular foundation models.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi is 29th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a 1st class M. Tech in CS/Biomedical Design or a 1st Class Dual degree in CS/Biomedical Design/Engineering Design, along with NET/GATE qualification or equivalent.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA @27%.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all required documents and send it to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Jr. Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Jr. Research Fellow position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: IIT Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110016.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or age relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/146/2026.
